title: Volisnova 2 Pack Farmhouse Apothecary Jars with Lids - Glass Qtip Dispensers and Cotton Ball Holders for Bathroom Vanity Storage and Organization with 8 Pcs Wterproof Labels (Clear Glass)
description:
About this item
Premium Glass Qtip Holder Jars: This set includes two 350ml capacity glass jars with sealed ball lids, designed to securely hold cotton swabs, balls, floss, makeup remover, and more. They are a versatile and practical addition to any bathroom or dressing room.
Waterproof labels included: The jars come with 8 pieces waterproof labels, allowing you to easily label and organize your items. The list of labels included Cotton Swabs, Cotton Balls, Cotton Rounds, Floss Picks, Bath Salts, Hair Ties, Makeup Sponges, Hair Accessory. The labels are an attractive and functional addition to the jars.
Durable and High-Quality: Crafted from high-quality glass, these jars are built to last and withstand daily use. Their solid construction ensures secure storage and makes them a reliable option for your home.
Stylish and Decorative: With their sleek and elegant design, these jars add beauty and charm to any bathroom or dressing room. They complement various decor styles, making them a perfect choice for those seeking functional and stylish storage solutions.
Practical and Guaranteed Satisfaction: These apothecary storage jars offer both practicality and aesthetics. They efficiently organize your space while providing visual appeal. Additionally, a 100% satisfaction guarantee is provided, ensuring customer satisfaction and support for any concerns or issues.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
Play Video
Great quality, so beautifully stained! The glass is not coated, they feel expressive lol.. they have weight to them in a good way. Air lock sealed is great!! Keeps the moisture out!! It dose come with labels the labels are really good quality. The size is also good not to small or big. They give a fancy feel to the bathroom. Love. Love. Love!! ❤️Absolutely love these little apothecary jars! The labels are a nice touch as well. Very well made and great airtight sealing lids. They are super small - as they are made for small bathroom items. But they’re perfect for my needs.I had ordered several different ones like these, but they all came super small. These are perfect. Fit a handful of Q-tips and don’t feel cheap.Exactly what I was looking for to put my Qtips and cotton balls in. The lids keep them clean. and lift off easily. I was surprised at the excellent quality.These apothecary jars are exactly the right size and are nicely weighted. Good product. Really like the classy labels that came with them.Love them, tight seal.Perfect in my new bathroom!I love these jars! Very well made.It was just the size jars I was looking for. I didn’t put the sticker on the jars (label the item). I just haven’t decided if I’m going to but I think it would be just fine if you did. I think I’m just gonna leave mine plain to make it easier to wash them. I personally took the lip seals off too because I don’t want the jar to be hard to open it’s not food. But the seals are nice and snug if that’s what you are looking for.These are a perfect addition to our bathroom. Comes with labels already printed. Easy to apply to jar. Looks very elegant. We are very pleased with them. I would recommend this product to others.
